*Incident summary:* Users in the Germany region primarily Frankfurt reported being unable to access the site. Internal teams were unable to reproduce the issue from other regions and overall platform metrics appeared stable. Adservice was noted as not running but its relevance to the access failure remained uncertain.
*Impact:* Approximately 40–50 customer reports indicating they could not access the site seemingly restricted to users located in or routed through Germany.
*Start date/time:* 10/12/2025 12:05 UTC
 (Bob’s first report at 14:05 local time converted from UTC+2)
*End date/time:* Not yet confirmed
*Next steps:*
• Continue validating the scope of affected users in Germany.
• Confirm whether adservice issues are contributing to failed access flows.
• Attempt further replication from Germany IP or via platform team.
• Gather additional user reports to determine whether impact is growing.
• Investigate recent changes linked in change list.
